name: Oatmeal Buttermilk Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Add oats and soda to buttermilk. Let stand for 5 minutes.
2. Sift together flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
3. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients, shortening, and eggs to the oats mixture. Stir until fully combined.
4. For each pancake, pour about 1/4 cup batter onto a hot, lightly greased griddle.
5. Cook pancakes to a golden brown color, turning only once.
6. Serve hot with butter and syrup. Makes 14 to 16 pancakes.
